metadata.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Considerations on Authoritative Information for Source Address Validation
Analysis of TOA vs. ROA for Prefixes Not Announced in BGP but Used for Source Addresses
The Updates on the Gap Analysis, Problem Statement, and  Requirements for Inter-domain SAV
